summary: Branch A+B executed: all 6 target artifacts reproduced byte-identically against baseline (SHA256 verified), headline armKAT OR = 3.28721 (95% CI 1.570-6.885, p = 0.00161) reasserted; full tidyverse/survival/mice/quarto enrichment stack ran successfully (pooled-mice OR 3.26 within 0.77% of 3.29, coxph HR 0.426 < 1, quarto render exit 0).

artifacts.summary: Re-run execution summary covering all 7 phases with Branch A byte-identity verification and Branch B enrichment results
Canonical re-run summary at the study location with provenance and byte-identity table
Four enriched analysis scripts (tidyverse, survival, mice, quarto) authored and executed

completion_data.completion_summary: Re-ran examples/epi-study/ pipeline end-to-end with LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Branch A verified byte-identical reproduction of all six committed target artifacts (three raw CSVs, analytic.csv, primary_results.txt, sensitivity_results.txt) against Phase 2 baseline; headline armKAT OR 3.28721 (95% CI 1.570-6.885, p = 0.00161) reasserted. Branch B executed the full enrichment stack (task 27 rebuild via dotfiles 47 confirmed landed): broom::tidy logistic regression, survival::coxph (HR 0.426, p < 1e-5), mice::pool m=20 (pooled OR 3.2620, 0.77% deviation from complete-case), and quarto HTML render (exit 0). broom.helpers gap handled gracefully via requireNamespace gate; gtsummary::tbl_regression skipped with fallback note. Frozen scripts 01-05 verified unchanged.
roadmap_items: Consider adding broom.helpers to nix rWrapper derivation to enable full gtsummary::tbl_regression workflow (minor, non-blocking)

next_steps: Skill postflight: transition task 28 to [COMPLETED]. Optional follow-up task to add broom.helpers to rWrapper.
